sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE, period INTEGER);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, period) VALUES (1, 100.0, 1), (2, 200.0, 1), (3, 150.0, 2), (4, 175.0, 2);
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE period = 1;
SELECT regr_intercept(amount, period) AS intercept FROM sales;
SELECT regr_intercept(SUM(amount), AVG(period)) AS avg_intercept FROM sales GROUP BY period;
